description: Auto-update dependencies after a 14-day cooling period so we don't land on freshly-published broken releases. Patch + minor updates auto-merge; majors require review.

packageRules.description: Group non-major updates of the client-side stack into one PR so I don't drown in 6 separate PRs every week.
Majors always require a human look — breaking API changes are common (e.g., TypeScript 5 → 6).
GitHub Actions versions — group these too, patch+minor auto-merge.

vulnerabilityAlerts.description: Security fixes bypass the 14-day hold and schedule.
